# Gajae Workflow Parity Matrix

Wave 1 behavioral/protocol parity inventory for ASA runtime workflow harness work. This matrix records contracts only; it does not copy Gajae source code.

| ID | Gajae reference | Behavioral contract | ASA target | Tests | Status | Verification evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| workflow_gate_flat_shape | `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/python/gjc-rpc/tests/test_protocol.py:200-217`, `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/python/gjc-rpc/tests/test_protocol.py:324-342` | Flat non-event `workflow_gate` frames carry `gate_id`, `stage`, `kind`, `schema`, `schema_hash`, `context`, `created_at`, and `options`. | `workflow_harness.py`; `workflow_runtime.py`; `test_workflow_gate_protocol.py` | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`; `tests/test_workflow_runtime_parity.py::test_rich_gate_blocks_until_runtime_response_and_persists_flat_shape` | implemented | `.omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G002-final-workflow-pytest.log` |
| wrapped_event_envelope | `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/python/gjc-rpc/README.md:260-273` | Canonical runtime events are wrapped in `type=event` frames; non-event frames such as `workflow_gate` remain flat. | `agent_loop.py`; `provider_tool_choice_model.py`; `test_workflow_gate_protocol.py` | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`; `tests/test_workflow_runtime_parity.py::test_workflow_gate_schema_hash_includes_goal_identity` | implemented | `.omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G002-final-workflow-pytest.log` |
